title: Elastic Q2 FY2025 Financial Results
text: Elastic reported strong performance in its second quarter of fiscal 2025, with total revenue reaching $365 million, representing an 18% year-over-year increase (17% in constant currency). Cloud Revenue Growth: The company's cloud division demonstrated particularly robust expansion, with Elastic Cloud revenue climbing to $169 million, a 25% year-over-year increase. This cloud segment now represents 46% of total revenue. Customer Expansion: Elastic's customer base continued to grow meaningfully. The company reported over 1,420 customers with Annual Contract Value exceeding $100,000, compared to over 1,220 in the same quarter last year. Total subscription customers reached approximately 21,300. Profitability Metrics: On a non-GAAP basis, the company achieved an operating margin of 18%, with operating income of $64 million. CEO Ash Kulkarni stated that Elastic delivered a strong second quarter supported by solid sales execution, exceeding guidance across all metrics. Outlook: For fiscal 2025, Elastic projects total revenue between $1.451 billion and $1.457 billion, representing 15% year-over-year growth at the midpoint. This guidance reflects the company's confidence in continued expansion and customer growth momentum.
